name: Climate.Thermostat → Fan Only Action
description: The action to call when the climate device should activate its fan only (but does not heat or cool). When `fan_only_cooling` is set to `false`, the thermostat controller immediately triggers this action when set to `fan_only_mode`  ; however, when `fan_only_cooling` is set to `true`, this action is called based on the upper target temperature (similar to `cool_action` above).
